description: "Understanding phase — ask clarifying questions, identify goals, constraints, edge cases and assumptions BEFORE any design or code. Phase 1 of the DevFlow lifecycle."

# DevFlow — Brainstorm Phase

Run ONLY the Brainstormer phase of the DevFlow lifecycle.

## Instructions

Invoke the `devflow-brainstormer` skill to:

1. Ask clarifying questions if requirements are ambiguous (use `vscode_askQuestions`)
2. Identify: Goal, Constraints, Edge Cases, Assumptions
3. Restate the problem in your own words to confirm understanding
4. Save the Problem Statement to `/memories/session/devflow/context.md`
5. Initialize `/memories/session/devflow/phase-state.md`
6. Hand off to the Architect (Phase 2) when understanding is complete

Do NOT write any code, design, schema, or architecture in this phase.

Read session memory first if a cycle is already in progress (`/memories/session/devflow/`).
